description: Modify Os_Toolkit.py to rebuild path_index and string_index when a session is loaded.

description: Re-run the Os_Toolkit.py analyze_file command for onboarder.py and then re-query.

description: Modify onboarder.py to call Os_Toolkit.py analyze_file for each discovered tool during the catalog process.

title: Re-run onboarder.py catalog.
description: Re-run onboarder.py catalog.

title: Modify Os_Toolkit.py's query output to display det
description: Modify Os_Toolkit.py's query output to display detailed file breakdown for artifacts, nodes, and verbs. Benchmark: Query Os_Toolkit.py about onboarder.py and verify that the output contains all requested detailed fields (imports, URLs, IPs, strings, 6W1H, hashes, etc.) for file artifacts.

title: Demonstrate Filesync.py insights for a file (timel
description: Demonstrate Filesync.py insights for a file (timeline context and relationships). Benchmark: For a queried file, successfully retrieve its related entries from the latest Filesync report and identify other files referencing it using Filesync.py --match-file.

title: Demonstrate "Inverse Query" using Os_Toolkit.py (f
description: Demonstrate "Inverse Query" using Os_Toolkit.py (find files that import a specific module). Benchmark: Execute an Os_Toolkit.py query for a common Python import string and get a list of relevant files.

title: Understand onboarder.py's tool loading logic. Benc
description: Understand onboarder.py's tool loading logic. Benchmark: Pinpoint the exact code responsible for loading/accessing onboarded_tools and consolidated_menu.json within the handle_list function.

title: Verify babel_data/inventory/consolidated_menu.json
description: Verify babel_data/inventory/consolidated_menu.json content. Benchmark: Output of the consolidated_menu.json showing tool entries.

title: Fix onboarder.py list tool loading. Benchmark: Run
description: Fix onboarder.py list tool loading. Benchmark: Run python3 onboarder.py list --detailed and verify it successfully lists the tools with detailed metadata.

title: Add query-unified command to onboarder.py. Benchma
description: Add query-unified command to onboarder.py. Benchmark: Running python3 onboarder.py query-unified --help displays correct usage.

title: Implement handle_query_unified initial verbose out
description: Implement handle_query_unified initial verbose output. Benchmark: Run python3 onboarder.py query-unified /home/commander/Desktop/System_Journal/System_Journal/inventory/tools/scripts/Babel_v01a/onboarder.py (or using its tool_id). Verify that the output is a comprehensive, combined view of the tool's profile from all three tools.

title: Add interactive drill-down to handle_query_unified
description: Add interactive drill-down to handle_query_unified. Benchmark: Run python3 onboarder.py query-unified <target>, observe the initial output, and then interactively select an option (e.g., '1' for 6W1H) and verify the detailed follow-up.

title: Formalize "Gap" Analysis Integration. Benchmark: T
description: Formalize "Gap" Analysis Integration. Benchmark: Trigger the "gap" analysis and verify that it intelligently points out specific areas of missing or inconsistent information.

title: Understand Filesync's exact temporal grouping logi
description: Understand Filesync's exact temporal grouping logic. Benchmark: Provide a clear explanation of Filesync.py's temporal grouping logic.

title: Final Directory Verification. Benchmark: Confirm e
description: Final Directory Verification. Benchmark: Confirm exports and organized contain data; note status of journals, logs, and catalogs subdirs.

title: Project Intelligence Layer
description: Implement _infer_project_type logic in Filesync.py to analyze clusters.

title: Correction Interface
description: Add CLI flags to Filesync.py for manual project correction.

title: Os_Toolkit Display Integration
description: Integrate Filesync timeline data into Os_Toolkit file analysis output.

title: Launcher Query Integration
description: Update launcher.py to route generic queries to Os_Toolkit.

title: Fix Project Association
description: Ensure file IDs are correctly linked to Project IDs in Filesync manifest.

title: P0: Remove Gemini/Node from SYSTEM_DNA
description: Lines 88-89 incorrectly mark external agents as core system. Critical security fix.

title: P0: Create trust_registry.json
description: Track first-seen timestamps for processes/PIDs/IPs to verify identity after breach.

title: P1: Implement SystemLogAnalyzer
description: Interface with journalctl and /var/log for system event correlation.

title: P1: Integrate /.claude/plans with export
description: Make Claude plans visible in Os_Toolkit, upgrade legacy export functions.

title: P1: Upgrade export to include todos + plans + Filesync data
description: Export currently only saves session artifacts. Should bundle: plans/todos.json, ~/.claude/plans/*.md, Filesync manifests, onboarder inventory. Universal context pool.

title: P1: Add logs subcommand to Os_Toolkit CLI
description: New subcommand: Os_Toolkit.py logs --auth --systemd --network --correlate for direct Linux log querying via journalctl.

title: P1: Extend 6W1H for system events
description: Add context_type param to _generate_6w1h for process/service/network events. Use SYSTEM_DNA as seed. Currently only handles files.

title: P1: Refactor SYSTEM_DNA to structured format
description: Convert flat string dict to include why/category/trust/alerts_on_modification fields for proper 6W1H seeding.

title: P2: Debug Filesync project association (all None)
description: All files show project: None in manifests. Check _cluster_by_similarity() and _infer_project_type() execution in Filesync.py.

title: P2: Activity-based project inference in latest
description: Detect current project from terminal CWDs (/proc/pid/cwd), open editor files, recent modifications. Show in latest output.

title: P2: Add System Health + Trust Status to latest
description: latest should show journalctl failed services, auth anomalies, new IPs since last session, PID changes needing review.

title: P2: Zenity interactive trust verification dialogs
description: When untrusted IPs/processes detected, pop Zenity alert for Verify/Block/Review with DNS+TLS verification.

title: CARRY: Verify onboarder discover/consolidate/list/info/check-paths/session/run-menu/gui
description: Unchecked from CHECKLIST.md - none of these subcommands have been verified since integration.

title: CARRY: Verify Os_Toolkit analyze/query/file/journal/export/stats/save/interactive
description: Unchecked from CHECKLIST.md - these subcommands need testing. Export is confirmed legacy-only.

title: CARRY: Verify Filesync catalog/report/string-match/analyze-relationships/cluster-projects/organize/match-file
description: Unchecked from CHECKLIST.md - these flags need testing against babel_data/timeline.

title: CARRY: Deduplicate consolidated_menu.json
description: 34 tools with duplicates (3x Onboarder, 3x Orchestrator). Listed as P1 quick win in INTEGRATION_COMPLETE.md.

title: CARRY: Remove duplicate 6W1H printout in query output
description: Lines 2668-2678 and 2711-2720 print same data. Minor UX issue from INTEGRATION_COMPLETE.md.

title: LATER: Extend backup suggestion to ongoing activity
description: Monitor ongoing activity and proactively suggest backups. Trigger if significant changes without recent backup.

title: LATER: AST-based debug suggestion system
description: AST checks on Python scripts, infer suggested-actions (missing imports, unused vars). Requires package catalog coherence. stdlib ast or pylint/flake8.

title: META: Fix todo display bug
description: Line 616 Os_Toolkit.py - only done shows [x]. Add [~] in-progress, [-] cancelled, [ ] open. Add --status filter flag.

title: P1: Design SuggestiveGrepEngine class
description: Context-aware grep suggestions based on telemetry/activity/security. Categories: security, project_alignment, activity_inference, system_health.

title: P1: Integrate suggestive grep into latest workflow
description: Add SUGGESTED ACTIONS section to latest output with actionable commands.

title: P1: Integrate suggestive grep into check_security
description: When security warnings found, append kill/block/check commands.

title: LATER: CLI Command Strategy-Pattern Knowledge Base
description: Create .json with linux CLI commands mapped to situations (security/debug/project/health). Integrate with regex patterns and 6W1H classification. Grade suggested action quality, correct arg sequences based on --latest state. Examples: suspect telemetry->check IPs/paths, package installed->track PIDs/connections, clipboard routing->alert weird networking.

title: P1: Bidirectional Todo/Mark Sync System
description: Sync between ~/.claude/tasks/, plans/todos.json, and #[Mark] annotations. On --latest: read Claude tasks, Os_Toolkit todos, scan marks, reconcile status. Update all three sources to match.

title: P1: Implement sync_all_todos action
description: New action that reads ~/.claude/tasks/*.json, plans/todos.json, scans #[Mark] in codebase. Creates unified view, prompts user for conflicts, updates all sources.

title: Create trust_registry.json schema and loader
description: Implement TrustRegistry class with first-seen tracking for processes, PIDs, and IPs. Initialize on baseline_wakeup. Schema includes: os_components, external_agents, network_trust with verification methods. Priority: P0-security-2

title: Implement UnifiedTodoSync class in Os_Toolkit.py
description: Create class to sync ~/.claude/tasks, plans/todos.json, and #[Mark:] annotations. Methods: read_claude_tasks, read_os_toolkit_todos, scan_code_marks, reconcile, sync_to_os_toolkit, sync_to_marks

title: Integrate /.claude/plans with export system
description: Make /.claude/plans/*.md visible in Os_Toolkit list, integrate with export command. Allow viewing/reviewing plans from CLI. Upgrade legacy export functions. Priority: P1-integration

title: Implement SystemLogAnalyzer class
description: Create new class for journalctl, auth.log, and syslog parsing. Methods: get_auth_events(), get_systemd_events(), get_network_events(), correlate_with_artifacts(). Priority: P1-logs-1

title: Enhance check_security with log correlation
description: Cross-reference processes with journalctl, check auth.log for failures, verify network IPs against DNS. Integrate SystemLogAnalyzer into security check action. Priority: P1-logs-3

title: Clean up stale/cancelled todos from plans/todos.json
description: 3 cancelled export tasks (2oe1wmlas, i0an76g64, dlt3w03s7) and stale in-progress items (glyxdtwc5, im4racjei) need status cleanup. Clear dead weight from the todo list.

title: Extend _generate_6w1h for system events
description: Add context_type parameter ('file'|'process'|'service'|'network') and implement event-specific 6W1H generation using SYSTEM_DNA and journalctl data. Priority: P1-6w1h-1

title: Verify all Os_Toolkit/Onboarder/Filesync subcommands from CHECKLIST.md
description: Most subcommands in CHECKLIST.md are unchecked. Systematic -h and smoke test for each. Pushed into Os_Toolkit todos as CARRY tasks.

title: Integrate sync into --latest workflow
description: Call UnifiedTodoSync at end of latest command, show conflicts, prompt for sync via Zenity

title: Add telemetry tracking to process/connection analysis
description: Enhance _analyze_processes() and _analyze_active_connections() to record first-seen timestamps, PID changes, and verify against trust_registry. Track telemetry for security verification. Priority: P0-security-3

title: Add sync_all_todos action to ConformityAction framework
description: New action in actions dict that runs UnifiedTodoSync.reconcile(), prompts for conflicts, syncs all sources

title: Add 'logs' subcommand to Os_Toolkit CLI
description: New subcommand with --auth, --systemd, --network, --correlate flags for direct log querying. Integrates with SystemLogAnalyzer class. Priority: P1-logs-2

description: Added zenity_forms, zenity_checklist, zenity_progress, zenity_notification, zenity_question, zenity_radiolist, and display_output_with_actions at line 3820. Foundation for all interactive Zenity workflows. Enables Groups 2-7.

title: DISTRIBUTION: Implement clean Babel export system
description: Phase 1: Version increment, clean structure (bin/lib/data/docs), launcher scripts (babel, install.sh, babel.desktop), auto-generated docs. See BABEL_DISTRIBUTION_PLAN.md for complete vision. Goal: Export creates ready-to-run Babel_v01b from messy dev workspace.
